creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jun 22 14:33:13 2013
New Revision: 321574
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321574

Log:
  -update to 1.2.4
  -rc script passes rclint now
  -port passes portlint
  
  PR:		ports/179300
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (ayu@commun.jp, >3 weeks)

Modified:
  head/audio/murmur/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/murmur/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/murmur/files/murmur.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/murmur/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/audio/murmur/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/murmur/Makefile	Sat Jun 22 13:35:32 2013	(r321573)
+++ head/audio/murmur/Makefile	Sat Jun 22 14:33:13 2013	(r321574)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	murmur
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.3
-PORTREVISION=	4
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	audio net
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/mumble/Mumble/${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	mumble-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -43,7 +42,7 @@ CONFIG+=	no-dbus
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBONJOUR}
-LIB_DEPENDS+=	dns_sd.1:${PORTSDIR}/net/mDNSResponder
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	dns_sd:${PORTSDIR}/net/mDNSResponder
 .else
 CONFIG+=	no-bonjour
 .endif

Modified: head/audio/murmur/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/murmur/distinfo	Sat Jun 22 13:35:32 2013	(r321573)
+++ head/audio/murmur/distinfo	Sat Jun 22 14:33:13 2013	(r321574)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (mumble-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 05895122ae4abec3fb62ef24ed9d167ffd768e7080ed179c8bf3afca96d18a5c
-SIZE (mumble-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 3448053
+SHA256 (mumble-1.2.4.tar.gz) = a1cf8383d99a02719b16c5440e3a5fb5375a8aa060f203bfa5d25bc69f919c9b
+SIZE (mumble-1.2.4.tar.gz) = 3200084

Modified: head/audio/murmur/files/murmur.in
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/murmur/files/murmur.in	Sat Jun 22 13:35:32 2013	(r321573)
+++ head/audio/murmur/files/murmur.in	Sat Jun 22 14:33:13 2013	(r321574)
@@ -17,17 +17,16 @@
 
 . /etc/rc.subr
 
-# Set some defaults
-: ${murmur_enable="NO"}
-: ${murmur_user="murmur"}
-
 name=murmur
 rcvar=murmur_enable
+load_rc_config $name
+
+# Set some defaults
+: ${murmur_enable:=NO}
+: ${murmur_user=murmur}
 
 command="%%PREFIX%%/sbin/murmurd"
 command_args="-ini %%PREFIX%%/etc/murmur.ini"
-pidfile="/var/run/murmur/murmur.pid"
-
-load_rc_config $name
+pidfile=/var/run/murmur/murmur.pid
 
 run_rc_command "$1"

Modified: head/audio/murmur/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/murmur/pkg-descr	Sat Jun 22 13:35:32 2013	(r321573)
+++ head/audio/murmur/pkg-descr	Sat Jun 22 14:33:13 2013	(r321574)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Murmur is the server component of Mumble, a low-latency, high quality
 VoIP application.
 
-WWW:	http://mumble.sourceforge.net/
+WWW: http://mumble.sourceforge.net/
